footer.description: Digitalization for All. Helping businesses grow since 2002 with innovative IT solutions.
home.hero.subtitle: DIMATA connects operations, point-of-sale, staff attendance, and financial reporting into a single live suite — so what happens on the floor shows up on your dashboard the same minute, at every location.
home.stats.subtitle: Since 2002, we have been helping businesses grow through innovative technology solutions and dedicated support.
home.stats.yearsRunning.label: Years running
home.stats.yearsRunning.caption: In production since 2002 — not a recent rebrand.
home.stats.businessesOnboard.label: Businesses onboard
home.stats.businessesOnboard.caption: From single outlets to multi-branch operations.
home.stats.supportDesk.label: Support desk
home.stats.supportDesk.caption: A human on call, every hour your business runs.
home.howItWorks.title: From kickoff to live dashboard
home.howItWorks.subtitle: A three-step path we run with every client — the same sequence, whether you're onboarding one outlet or fifty.
home.howItWorks.step0.title: Connect
home.howItWorks.step0.description: We map your branches, roles, and existing tools, then wire the relevant DIMATA modules into your daily operations.
home.howItWorks.step1.title: Automate
home.howItWorks.step1.description: Attendance, transactions, and structure changes sync automatically — no more re-entering the same data twice.
home.howItWorks.step2.title: Oversee
home.howItWorks.step2.description: One dashboard gives you a live read on every branch, shift, and rupiah — with a support desk on standby 24/7.
home.products.title: Four modules. One shared source of truth.
home.products.subtitle: Each module works standalone, but the real value shows up when they talk to each other — data entered once, reflected everywhere.
home.products.01.name: ProChain
home.products.01.description: Operational structure management — branches, roles, and SOPs kept in sync across every location.
home.products.02.name: Hanoman
home.products.02.description: Guest data and POS management — every transaction and guest profile captured at the point of service.
home.products.03.name: Hairisma
home.products.03.description: Attendance and performance tracking — clock-ins, shift coverage, and staff performance in one view.
home.products.04.name: AISO
home.products.04.description: Real-time financial reporting — revenue, payroll, and costs reconciled automatically as data comes in.
home.cta.title: Ready to run every branch from one screen?
home.cta.subtitle: Talk to our team about which modules fit your operation first — most clients are live within weeks, not quarters.

products.hero.title: Our Products & Services
products.hero.subtitle: Comprehensive digital solutions to grow your business
products.erp.title: ERP Solutions
products.erp.shortDescription: Simple and affordable ERP solutions for SME
products.erp.detailedDescription: Simple and affordable ERP solutions designed specifically for SMEs with comprehensive features to manage your business operations. Improve efficiency, reduce operational costs, and make better business decisions with real-time data.
products.erp.purchasing.title: Purchasing
products.erp.purchasing.description: Manage procurement processes efficiently, from purchase requests to goods receipt.
products.erp.inventory.title: Inventory
products.erp.inventory.description: Monitor stock in real-time, manage goods movement, and optimize your inventory levels.
products.erp.productsMaster.title: Products Master & Costing
products.erp.productsMaster.description: Centralize product data and calculate production costs accurately to determine competitive selling prices.
products.erp.accounting.title: Accounting
products.erp.accounting.description: Automate financial recording, generate accurate reports, and monitor your business financial health.
products.erp.webMobile.title: Web & Mobile Solutions
products.erp.webMobile.description: Access your ERP system anytime, anywhere through web devices or mobile applications.
products.accommodation.title: Accommodation Solutions
products.accommodation.detailedDescripti: Simple and practical accommodation solutions for managing properties, guests, and reservations with integrated outlet services and accounting. Provide an unforgettable stay experience for your guests with seamless operations.
products.accommodation.property.title: Property Management
products.accommodation.property.descript: Manage all aspects of your property, from room status, maintenance, to housekeeping.
products.accommodation.guest.title: Guest Management
products.accommodation.guest.description: Store guest profiles, stay history, and preferences to provide more personalized service.
products.accommodation.reservation.title: Reservation & Registration Management
products.accommodation.reservation.descr: Centralized reservation system that facilitates booking, check-in, and guest check-out processes.
products.accommodation.outlet.title: Integrated Outlet Services
products.accommodation.outlet.descriptio: Seamless integration with restaurant, spa, and other facilities for easy billing.
products.accommodation.accounting.title: Accounting
products.accommodation.accounting.descri: Comprehensive financial reports directly integrated with all operational transactions.
products.hr.title: Human Resources and Payroll Systems
products.hr.shortDescription: Business solutions for comprehensive HR management
products.hr.detailedDescription: Comprehensive HR and payroll solutions for managing all aspects of human resource management and employee payroll. Automate HR administrative tasks so your team can focus on talent development and company culture.
products.hr.recruitment.title: Recruitment
products.hr.recruitment.description: Manage recruitment and application processes with a structured candidate tracking system.
products.hr.onboarding.title: Onboarding
products.hr.onboarding.description: Structured new employee orientation process to ensure a smooth transition.
products.hr.training.title: Training
products.hr.training.description: Training and development program management to improve team competence.
products.hr.operations.title: Operations
products.hr.operations.description: Manage daily HR operations efficiently in one centralized platform.
products.hr.leave.title: Leave & Scheduling
products.hr.leave.description: Flexible and easily accessible leave and work schedule management for employees.
products.hr.appraisals.title: Appraisals & Recognition
products.hr.appraisals.description: Performance appraisal and recognition system to motivate and retain top talent.
products.hr.structure.title: Company Structure
products.hr.structure.description: Manage company organizational structure, departments, and reporting hierarchy with clear visualization.
products.hr.workflow.title: Workflow
products.hr.workflow.description: Workflow and approval process automation to speed up decision-making.
products.hr.documents.title: Company Documents
products.hr.documents.description: Secure company document management with customizable access controls.
products.hr.overtime.title: Overtime
products.hr.overtime.description: Manage employee overtime data with automatic calculations integrated into payroll.
products.hr.contracts.title: Employee Contract Management
products.hr.contracts.description: Employee contract management with automatic reminders for renewal or evaluation.
products.hr.payroll.title: Payroll
products.hr.payroll.description: Accurate integrated payroll system that complies with tax regulations and is delivered on time.
products.hr.integration.title: Integration to Accounting
products.hr.integration.description: Directly integrated with accounting systems for automatic salary expense recording.
products.plantation.title: Plantation Information and Management Solutions
products.plantation.shortDescription: Comprehensive solutions for plantation and agricultural management
products.plantation.detailedDescription: Comprehensive plantation management solutions for managing projects, areas, plants, inventory, and production costs. Improve land productivity and plantation operational efficiency with data-driven monitoring.
products.plantation.projects.title: Projects Management
products.plantation.projects.description: Manage plantation projects efficiently, from planning to execution and evaluation.
products.plantation.areas.title: Areas Management
products.plantation.areas.description: Plantation area and land management with detailed block and planting block mapping.
products.plantation.plants.title: Plants Management
products.plantation.plants.description: Manage plant data, growth cycles, fertilization schedules, and care systematically.
products.plantation.inventory.title: Inventory & Cost Management
products.plantation.inventory.descriptio: Fertilizer, seedling, and tool inventory management, along with production cost tracking per land block.
products.plantation.production.title: Production Tracking
products.plantation.production.descripti: Monitor harvest production results in real-time and analyze land productivity trends.
products.accounting.title: Accounting Systems
products.accounting.shortDescription: Flexible accounting solutions for various business types
products.accounting.detailedDescription: Flexible and powerful accounting systems for various types of businesses with advanced features. Get full visibility into your company's cash flow and financial performance.
products.accounting.general.title: General Purpose Accounting
products.accounting.general.description: General accounting solutions for all types of businesses, designed to simplify bookkeeping and financial reporting.
products.accounting.general.flash.title: Flash Finance Report Generation
products.accounting.general.flash.descri: Fast financial reports from Excel data for instant analysis.
products.accounting.general.ai.title: AI-based Supporting Bookkeeping
products.accounting.general.ai.descripti: AI-based bookkeeping support to minimize input errors.
products.accounting.general.realtime.des: Real-time financial reports for faster decision-making.
products.accounting.general.multicurrenc: Multi-currency support for international business transactions.
products.accounting.travel.title: Travel Agent Business Accounting
products.accounting.travel.description: Accounting system specifically for travel agent businesses, equipped with commission management and vendor integration features.
products.accounting.travel.commission.de: Accurate and transparent agent commission and incentive management.
products.accounting.travel.booking.title: Booking & Invoice Integration
products.accounting.travel.booking.descr: Seamless integration between booking systems and invoice generation.
products.accounting.travel.reporting.des: Industry-specific travel reports to monitor tour package profitability.
products.accounting.travel.multivendor.d: Multi-vendor management (airlines, hotels, etc.) in one dashboard.

products.hero.title: Our Products & Services
products.hero.description: Comprehensive digital solutions to grow your business
products.erp.title: ERP Solutions
products.erp.shortDescription: Simple and affordable ERP solutions for SME
products.erp.detailedDescription: Simple and affordable ERP solutions designed specifically for SMEs with comprehensive features to manage your business operations. Increase efficiency, reduce operational costs, and make better business decisions with real-time data.
products.erp.purchasing.description: Efficiently manage your procurement processes, from initial purchase requests to goods receipt.
products.erp.inventory.description: Monitor stock in real time, track inventory movements, and optimize your overall inventory levels.
products.erp.products.description: Centralize product data and accurately calculate production costs to set competitive selling prices.
products.erp.accounting.description: Automate financial record-keeping, generate accurate reports, and monitor your business's financial health.
products.erp.web.description: Access your ERP system anytime, anywhere via web browsers and mobile applications.
products.saas.title: SaaS & On-Premise
products.saas.shortDescription: Purchase individual apps as you need them, with the flexibility of Cloud (SaaS) or Local Server (On-Premise) deployment.
products.saas.detailedDescription: All DIMATA products can be purchased individually or as an integrated suite. Choose our SaaS subscription for instant, hassle-free cloud access without server management, or opt for an On-Premise license for ultimate control over your IT infrastructure and local data.
products.saas.modular.description: Purchase and activate only the specific apps your business needs today—such as POS, HR, or Accounting—without paying for a massive, costly ERP bundle.
products.saas.cloud.description: A convenient, ready-to-use cloud subscription with zero upfront server investment, complete with automated maintenance and routine system updates.
products.saas.onpremise.description: Install directly onto your company's local servers or private cloud to meet strict corporate security policies and maintain total data governance.
products.saas.growth.description: Start with a single app to solve a specific operational challenge, and effortlessly add more connected modules as your business scales.
products.saas.ecosystem.description: Whether deployed as SaaS or On-Premise, all individual DIMATA apps are natively engineered to integrate and share data seamlessly in real time.
products.accommodation.title: Accommodation Solutions
products.accommodation.detailedDescripti: Simple and practical accommodation solutions to manage properties, guests, and reservations with integration to outlet services and accounting. Deliver an unforgettable stay experience for your guests with seamless operations.
products.accommodation.property.descript: Manage all aspects of your property, from room status and maintenance to housekeeping operations.
products.accommodation.guest.description: Store guest profiles, stay histories, and preferences to deliver a more personalized service experience.
products.accommodation.reservation.descr: A centralized reservation system that streamlines the booking, check-in, and check-out process.
products.accommodation.integrated.descri: Seamless integration with restaurant, spa, and other on-site facility services for simplified billing.
products.accommodation.accounting.descri: Comprehensive financial reporting directly integrated with all operational transactions.

products.hr.shortDescription: Business solutions for comprehensive HR management
products.hr.detailedDescription: Comprehensive HR and payroll solutions to manage all aspects of human resource management and employee payroll. Automate HR administrative tasks so your team can focus on talent development and company culture.

products.plantation.detailedDescription: Comprehensive plantation management solutions to manage projects, areas, crops, inventory, and production costs. Increase land productivity and operational efficiency of your plantation with data-driven monitoring.
